home.heroLede: I build web products where every <mark>detail</mark> holds.
home.quoteText: “Details make perfection, and perfection is not a detail.”
home.beaversBody: Co-founded with my wife. SEO (articles, netlinking), web development and GTM tracking, for agencies and clients.
home.skalpBody: Co-founded with my wife. Single-product e-commerce, built and operated end to end.
home.codeBody: A SaaS for netlinking specialists. Not out yet, built with my usual stack.
home.nextTitle: A family move to Sydney, on a {low} to {high} year horizon.
home.nextBody: That's the strategic reason everything I run is location-independent, and why this site is bilingual, built for an Australian network as much as a French one.

footer.heading: Get in touch
footer.intro: A project, a question, just want to talk? Write to me, I reply quickly.

form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thanks, your message is on its way. I'll get back to you very soon.
form.error: Sending failed. Please try again, or reach me on LinkedIn.

meta.homeTitle: Lucas Attali · Fullstack developer and entrepreneur
meta.homeDescription: Lucas Attali, fullstack developer between the Mediterranean and the Pacific. Co-founder of Beavers and Skalp. Next, SvelteKit, TypeScript, SEO, web development and e-commerce.
meta.aboutDescription: Fullstack developer and entrepreneur in the south of France, co-founder of Beavers and Skalp, Sydney on the horizon. Every detail held, from mockup to production.
meta.experienceDescription: Lucas Attali's career: more than ten years in web, from technical project manager to agency co-founder. SEO, development, Next, SvelteKit and TypeScript stack.
meta.workDescription: Lucas Attali's work: SEO and development results at Beavers, the build of Skalp, and a netlinking SaaS in the works.
